case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. FRANK NICHOLAS VERNIC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , A MINICIPAL CORPORPATION AS TO DEFENDANT VERNIC, FRANK NICHOLAS DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-09-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-17-2018
